name: keel-test-bridge
description: VS Code Testing API bridge for Keel's canonical devtool test protocol.

scripts.build:devtool: cd .. && mkdir -p bin && go build -o bin/keel-dev ./cmd/keel-dev && go build -o bin/keel-demo-dev ./cmd/keel-demo-dev
scripts.ci: pnpm run compile && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test:coverage
scripts.package:vsix: pnpm run compile && mkdir -p ../bin && vsce package --no-dependencies --allow-missing-repository --out ../bin/keel-test-bridge-${npm_package_version}.vsix
scripts.test: pnpm run compile && pnpm run build:devtool && vscode-test --fail-zero
scripts.test:headless: pnpm run compile && pnpm run build:devtool && xvfb-run -a vscode-test --fail-zero
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm run compile && pnpm run build:devtool && xvfb-run -a vscode-test --coverage --coverage-output .vscode-test/coverage --coverage-reporter text --coverage-reporter json-summary --fail-zero
scripts.test:e2e:packaged: pnpm run build:devtool && pnpm run package:vsix && node scripts/install-packaged-vsix.mjs && KEEL_REPO_ROOT=.. xvfb-run -a vscode-test --config .vscode-test-packaged.mjs --fail-zero
scripts.test:headless:json: pnpm run compile && pnpm run build:devtool && mkdir -p .vscode-test && KEEL_VSCODE_MOCHA_JSONL=.vscode-test/results.jsonl xvfb-run -a vscode-test --fail-zero --reporter ./test-jsonl-reporter.cjs
